siteDescription: Tailor-made Dutch language training in Amsterdam and the surrounding area for companies, institutions and individuals.

hero.intro: provides a wide range of Dutch training courses in Amsterdam and the surrounding area.
hero.body: Our courses are tailored to you, your wishes and goals, and can be offered at all levels, from complete beginner to advanced.
hero.imageAlt: Tim teaching an interactive Dutch lesson to a group of students

qualities.title: How De TaalBaas works
qualities.subtitle: Every course is different, but the approach is always:

items.label: Interactive
items.description: You are constantly speaking yourself, never passively listening.

items.label: Communicative
items.description: The focus is on real conversations you can use straight away outside class.

items.label: Task-oriented
items.description: You practise with concrete tasks from your work and daily life.

items.label: Practical
items.description: Dutch you can apply immediately — no dry theory for theory's sake.

items.label: Structured
items.description: A clear build-up from beginner to advanced, step by step.

items.label: Purposeful
items.description: We work together towards your specific goal or exam.

items.label: Dynamic
items.description: Varied formats keep every lesson fresh and engaging.

sections.coursesSubtitle: Open enrolment for group classes. Prefer a tailor-made or in-company course? Feel free to request a quote.
sections.reviewsSubtitle: A selection of reviews from former students.
sections.practiceSubtitle: Students speaking, lesson situations and a day out with the group through the city.

contact.title: Rates / requesting a quote
contact.intro: Would you like to request a quote with no further obligations? Simply get in touch with us.

footer.tagline: Tailor-made Dutch language training in Amsterdam and the surrounding area.
